message: Build a full-stack task management web app using Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and SQLite (via better-sqlite3). Include: user registration and login with JWT auth, a dashboard showing all tasks, the ability to create tasks with a title, description, priority (low/medium/high), and due date, mark tasks as complete, and delete them. Use React Server Components for data fetching, API routes for mutations, and client components only where interactivity is needed. Create a proper project structure: app/, components/, lib/, types/, plus package.json, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts, and a README.
